w:r.w:t: The system is to be operated and maintained only by trained / and authorized personnel.
In event of abnormal operation (unusual sounds, oil leakage, smoke, etc.) immediately stop operation and take appropriate corrective me
Make sure that the safety devices / buttons are working correctly before operating the system.
Weight is not proportional to size of unit’s/sub systems/components. Take necessary precautions when handling.
Make sure proper illumination has been provided
Keep safe distance from unit during lifting of units.
Do not operate with faulty or incompletely prepared sub-assemblies, lifting gear, tool and fixtures.
Make sure that unit is mounted at proper height, preferably from deck floor, so that operator operates the panel easily from standing position.

For safety reasons presence of person is forbidden in the zone of radius 12 m on sides and behind the engine and in the zone of radius 1 m in front of the engine. In these zones there can be the owner and the operator equipped with noise protection.
